title: Physical Gift Card
description:
The perfect gift for the one you adore and not quite sure what exactly will tickle their fancy...

Select the desired amount and ensure you enter the recipient's shipping address if you would like the gift card to be sent directly to them.

Want an eco-friendly digital option? Shop E-Gift Cards!

 ❧ Gift Cards are redeemable Online and at our Sellwood flagship store in Portland, OR 

Please note that our satellite retail location inside of Urbanite is run through a separate business and uses a separate POS systems from ours, as such gift cards can only be redeemed on our online store and at our flagship store in Sellwood and are not accepted at our satellite retail location.

title: French Lavender Sheet Mask Set
description:
Refresh your skin in 20 minutes with a French Lavender Sheet Mask. Infused with Lavender Extract, Hyaluronic Acid, and Okra Fruit Extract, it hydrates and soothes while the biodegradable sheet ensures an eco-friendly experience. 

  • Pack of four
  • Paraben and alcohol-free
  • Imported

About 123 Farm

123 Farm is Southern California’s largest certified organic lavender farm, located on the historic Highland Springs Ranch & Inn in Cherry Valley. With a legacy that has welcomed notable guests such as Albert Einstein, Wyatt Earp, and Ernest Hemingway, the farm spans over 20 acres of blooming lavender and botanicals, rooted in a commitment to sustainability, wellness, and natural beauty.

title: Save-The-Bees Plantable Pencil
description:
Write with purpose using this plantable pencil. Once too short to use, plant it to grow bee-friendly wildflowers. Made in the USA from natural materials, it comes in cute triangle packaging — perfect for eco-conscious gifting.

title: Dishtowel Set
description:
Brown dishtowel set of 2 by tag. Tag’s classic dishtowel set has been a favorite since 1975. Made from soft yarn-dyed chambray, it combines great absorbency with lasting quality and style. Ideal for gifting or everyday kitchen use.

  • Cotton / 26" L x 18" W
  • Machine wash cold
  • Made in India

About tag

For five decades, tag has been a leading lifestyle brand headquartered in Chicago. We design beautiful and functional products for every corner of the home, from indoors to garden and outdoor escapes. We offer both seasonal accents and everyday essentials, all crafted to inspire connection and enhance moments with loved ones. Our collections seamlessly integrate into any decor blending form with function. Driven by innovation, we strive to create products that spark joy and elevate everyday living.

title: Balsam Fir Soap
description:
The Balsam Fir Handmade Soap Bar from Adirondack Fragrance & Flavor Farm has a fresh, soothing scent inspired by peaceful forest walks. Wrapped in soft cloth, it gently cleanses your skin and leaves a delicate, romantic fragrance. Perfect for adding calm and beauty to your daily routine.

  • 2 oz
  • Made in United States

About Adirondack Fragrance Flavor Farm

Adirondack Fragrance & Flavor Farm is based in the Adirondack region of upstate, New York. We plant, water, weed and grow the loveliest smelling and tasting plants that endure our short but sublime growing season. We also work with local cedar distillers, chaga mushroom hunters and trappers to garner some of our region’s most exotic and alluring scents. All these natural gifts are gathered and prepared for inclusion in regionally inspired perfumes and complimentary products that we design and market nationally.

The entire collection uses locally grown ingredients, and all of our candles are made with 100% domestically-grown soy wax.

title: Balsam Cedar Soap
description:
The Balsam Cedar Handmade Soap Bar from Adirondack Fragrance & Flavor Farm offers a gentle cleanse with a fresh, woodsy scent of balsam fir and cedar. Wrapped in cloth, it adds a soft, romantic touch to your daily routine, bringing the calming beauty of nature to your skin.

  • 2 oz
  • Made in United States

title: Strolling in Pienza Dress
description:
Timeless and feminine vintage 90s inspired maxi sleeveless shirtdress in a breezy tan plaid cotton. This dress is so reminiscent of something a heroine in a Nora Ephron movie would wear at a week away in Italy to rediscover herself. Well, that's where our minds go anyway.

Features:

  • V-neckline with collar
  • Functional buttons down the front
  • Functional front pockets
  • Self sash to cinch waist
  • 65% Cotton 35% Rayon / Lining: 100% Cotton
  • Imported

  • M: 53" length / 36"-48" bust / best 28"-30" waist / 15" bodice
  • L: 54" length / 38"-40" bust / best 30"-32" waist / 15.5" bodice

title: Secret Garden Dress
description:
Steeped in old-world romance, this feminine vintage-inspired sleeveless midi dress feels like a treasured piece from a bygone era, featuring a graceful portrait neckline with wide, almost cap-like straps that frame the shoulders beautifully. Its tapestry-inspired floral print evokes an antique garden painting with rich, moody hues blooming against a dark backdrop, while the smocked, elasticated back offers a comfortable, flattering fit. A box-pleated skirt adds gentle structure and movement, and a hidden side zipper completes this timeless piece.  Perfect for holiday gatherings, special occasions, or any moment when you want to feel truly lovely.

  • Smocked and elasticated back
  • Hidden side zipper
  • 100% Polyester
  • Imported

Fit Notes & Measurements

  • S: 47" length / best fits 32"-34" bust / 13" waist (max)
  • M: 47.5" length / best fits 34"-36" bust / 14" waist (max) 
  • L: 48" length / best fits 36"-38" bust / 15" waist (max)

description:
Effortlessly romantic and quietly elegant, this vintage-inspired dark navy midi dress evokes the charm of days gone by. Designed with a softly squared neckline and a smocked, elasticated bodice that flatters while offering gentle comfort, it’s a piece meant for easy, graceful wear. The ¾-length Juliet sleeves add a touch of poetic femininity, while the flowing skirt moves beautifully with every step.

title: School Days Day Dress
description:
Timeless and feminine, vintage 1960s cotton shirt day dress in a lovely peach brown hue. This dress feature buttons down the bodice, sleeves that can be cuffed (shown uncuffed), pleats at the waist for fullness, and roomy side patch pockets on the skirt. The dress has contrast white thread dashed stitching giving it a more scholarly effect. Dress has a set waist and small belt loops. 

  • Era: 1960s
  • Fabric: Cotton
  • Measurements: 36.5" length / 15" bodice / 17" across chest / 13" across waist
  • Sizing: Best fits XS/Small
  • Condition: Excellent vintage condition

title: Artisan Perfume Discovery Set
description:
The Artisan Perfume Spray Discovery Set invites you to explore five clean, wildcrafted fragrances inspired by the Adirondack woods. Each scent—Balsam & Cedar, Balsam & Lavender, Milkweed, Wild Rose, and Sweetgrass—reflects the natural beauty and lasting connection of Artisan Sandy with her land. Crafted from sustainably gathered botanicals, this set offers a romantic journey through the fresh, wild scents of nature.

  • Set of 5 / 2ml each
  • Made in United States

We plant, water, weed and grow the loveliest smelling and tasting plants that endure our short but sublime growing season. We also work with local cedar distillers, chaga mushroom hunters and trappers to garner some of our region’s most exotic and alluring scents. All these natural gifts are gathered and prepared for inclusion in regionally inspired perfumes and complimentary products that we design and market nationally.

The entire collection uses locally grown ingredients, and all of our candles are made with 100% domestically-grown soy wax.

title: Shinrin-Yoku Shampoo Bar
description:
Inspired by the traditional Japanese practice of forest bathing, the Shinrin-Yoku Shampoo Bar invites you to indulge in a sensory journey that transports you to the serene embrace of nature. As you cleanse your skin with this exquisite shampoo, you will be enveloped in the soothing scents of the forest, fostering a sense of tranquility and rejuvenation.

  • 2.5 oz
  • Made in United States

About Adirondack Fragrance Flavor Farm

Adirondack Fragrance & Flavor Farm is based in the Adirondack region of upstate, New York. We plant, water, weed and grow the loveliest smelling and tasting plants that endure our short but sublime growing season. We also work with local cedar distillers, chaga mushroom hunters and trappers to garner some of our region’s most exotic and alluring scents. All these natural gifts are gathered and prepared for inclusion in regionally inspired perfumes and complimentary products that we design and market nationally.

The entire collection uses locally grown ingredients, and all of our candles are made with 100% domestically-grown soy wax.

title: Shinrin-Yoku Soap
description:
The Shinrin-Yoku Soap (Therapeutic Forest Bathing) is a handcrafted masterpiece from the esteemed Adirondack Fragrance & Flavor Farm. This captivating soap is meticulously made using a blend of premium ingredients, ensuring a truly immersive and rejuvenating forest bathing experience.

  • 4 oz
  • Made in United States

title: What Is Beautiful Is Good Art Print
description:
The What Is Beautiful Is Good Art Print by Parcel combines romantic design with inspiring words about kindness and beauty. It’s a lovely way to add warmth to your home or give as a meaningful gift that celebrates love and grace.

  • 8.5" x 11" (fits nicely in a 10 x 12 frame)
  • Made in United States

About Parcel

Parcel offers a rich selection of beautifully crafted stationery and decorations with a charming old-world feeling. We aim to enchant and delight all generations with our handmade goods. Parcel is a small team of four and every item is made by hand.

title: The Deck of Mushrooms
description:
The Deck of Mushrooms is a beautifully illustrated set that celebrates the delicate beauty of mushrooms. Perfect for nature lovers and those seeking inspiration, each card reveals the magic of the forest. Use it for creativity, reflection, or as a thoughtful, romantic gift.

  • Made in United States
